class.name: PlayFabPartyTextMessageConfig
class.brief_description: Per-message options for [method PlayFabPartyChat.send_text_async] and [method PlayFabPartyChatControl.send_text_async].
class.description: Optional language and translation hints applied when the addon forwards a text message through the local Party chat control.

members.member: BCP-47 language code for the source message.
List of BCP-47 language codes the message should be translated into.
Title-supplied metadata attached to the message.
